name: Express Pawn Shop & Money Exchange
description_short: Express Pawn is a 9-location San Diego pawn shop specializing in collateral-based loans on jewelry, luxury goods, and electronics with over 40 years of experience.
description_long:
Express Pawn operates as a high-end pawn broker based in San Ysidro, San Diego, with nine locations throughout the San Diego area. The company has been in operation for over 40 years and positions itself as a premium alternative to traditional payday lenders and banks for consumers needing quick collateral-based loans. Their core business model centers on providing non-recourse loans secured by personal assets rather than credit checks or income verification.

The company offers collateral loans on a wide range of items including gold, silver, platinum jewelry, designer handbags, high-end watches, diamonds, numismatic coins, bullion, professional-grade tools, electronics, and other hard goods. They operate a buy-sell-pawn model: customers can pawn items for cash loans, sell items outright for immediate payment, or purchase pre-owned items. Express Pawn explicitly markets a promotional offer of 0% interest on first loans up to $500 for five months with no hidden fees, positioning this as a zero-cost borrowing option for qualifying customers.

Express Pawn distinguishes itself through emphasis on luxury asset specialization, professional gemologist services (GIA Graduate Gemologist on staff), fair market valuations, and community integration. The website repeatedly highlights "exceptional customer experience," "honesty and integrity," and the principle that "customers are family." They market themselves as not your "average pawn shop" and emphasize discretion and professionalism in handling high-end collateral. The company also features employee testimonials suggesting personalized service from named staff members.

While Express Pawn operates transparently within the pawn industry, consumers should understand that pawn loans charge interest on amounts exceeding the promotional threshold, and failure to repay results in loss of the collateral item. The website does not disclose specific interest rates beyond the promotional offer, making it difficult to assess the full cost of borrowing beyond the first $500. As a non-recourse loan product, pawn lending is best suited for consumers who can afford to lose the pledged item rather than those in financial hardship.
address: 390 E San Ysidro Blvd, San Ysidro, CA 92173

company_info.headquarters: 390 E San Ysidro Blvd, San Ysidro, CA 92173

pros: First loan promotion: 0% interest up to $500 for 5 months with no hidden fees
GIA Graduate Gemologist on staff for professional jewelry and diamond appraisal
Non-recourse loans—no credit impact if customer cannot repay and loses collateral
9 convenient San Diego-area locations for accessibility
Accepts wide range of collateral including luxury items (designer handbags, high-end watches)
Over 40 years of operating history and established community presence
Transparent pawn model with no surprise fees on promotional tier
cons: Interest rates not disclosed on website for loans above $500 promotional threshold
Collateral loss risk: customer forfeits pledged item if unable to repay
Limited to San Diego region only—not a statewide or national lender
Pawn loans require physical collateral, excluding those without valuable items to pledge
No mention of alternative repayment plans or loan extensions if customer faces hardship
best_for: Consumers with valuable personal assets (jewelry, watches, electronics) who need immediate cash and can afford collateral loss
High-net-worth individuals seeking discreet short-term collateral loans on luxury goods
San Diego-area residents seeking alternatives to payday loans or personal loans for amounts under $500 during promotional period
Customers specifically seeking to buy or sell pre-owned luxury items at discount prices
diagnosis: Express Pawn is best for San Diego-area consumers with valuable personal collateral who need quick cash and can afford to lose the pledged item if unable to repay. The main caveat is that interest rates beyond the promotional $500 tier are not disclosed, and the non-recourse nature means financial hardship can result in permanent loss of assets rather than credit damage.
services: Collateral-based pawn loans on jewelry, watches, diamonds, and precious metals
Collateral loans on designer handbags and luxury accessories
Collateral loans on electronics and hard goods
Collateral loans on numismatic coins and bullion
Purchase of jewelry, gold, silver, platinum, and precious metals at market value
Purchase of electronics, tools, and other hard goods
Sale of pre-owned and consignment jewelry, luxury goods, electronics, and tools
GIA Graduate Gemologist appraisal and authentication services
Money exchange services (referenced in company name)
0% interest promotional loans up to $500 for five months
